scripts.clear: pnpm run clear:dist && pnpm run clear:cache
scripts.build: parcel build src/index.html --public-url https://pixu1980.github.io/reactive-apps-without-frameworks/ && git add . && git commit --amend --no-edit && git push -f
scripts.rel:major: pnpm run build && pnpm version major -m "rel(%s)" && pnpm run rel:push
scripts.rel:minor: pnpm run build && pnpm version minor -m "rel(%s)" && pnpm run rel:push
scripts.rel:patch: pnpm run build && pnpm version patch -m "rel(%s)" && pnpm run rel:push
scripts.format: pnpm run format:prettier && pnpm run format:biome
